characters.name: 豆豆
characters.personality: 好奇心旺盛、胆大心细、黏人

appearance.features: 尾巴尖有一点白色，左耳有个小缺口

voice.style: 内心独白式，像在对观众说话

key_traits: 看到移动物体就会追逐
害怕时会把身体缩成一团

reference_prompts.front: an adorable orange tabby cat with white belly, big amber eyes, fluffy, slightly chubby, anime style, warm lighting, front view, cute expression
reference_prompts.side: an adorable orange tabby cat with white belly, big amber eyes, fluffy, slightly chubby, anime style, warm lighting, side view, curious expression
reference_prompts.three_quarter: an adorable orange tabby cat with white belly, big amber eyes, fluffy, slightly chubby, anime style, warm lighting, three-quarter view, playful expression

characters.name: 小林
characters.personality: 温柔、忙碌但爱猫、有幽默感

appearance.clothing: 简单的白色T恤+牛仔裤（居家/通勤）

key_traits: 出门前会和豆豆说再见
回家第一件事是找豆豆
对豆豆的淘气又气又笑

reference_prompts.front: a young Asian woman age 28, black hair in low ponytail, dark brown eyes, wearing white t-shirt and jeans, anime style, warm lighting, front view, gentle smile
reference_prompts.side: a young Asian woman age 28, black hair in low ponytail, wearing white t-shirt and jeans, anime style, warm lighting, side view, walking pose
reference_prompts.three_quarter: a young Asian woman age 28, black hair in low ponytail, wearing white t-shirt and jeans, anime style, warm lighting, three-quarter view, surprised expression
